content.problemStatement:
You are given two positive integers x,yx, yx,y.

Find the smallest positive integer zzz such that zzz contains xxx as a prefix (in base 10) and zzz is divisible by yyy.

If the smallest such z>1018z > 10^{18}z>1018, print -1.


Input Format

The first line of the input contains an integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of the test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers x,yx, yx,y.


Output Format
For each test case, output an integer zzz corresponding to the answer of the problem. If z>1018z > 10^{18}z>1018, output -1 instead.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Testcase 1: 21 has 2 as a prefix, and is divisible by 3. Hence this is a valid zzz. You can check that no smaller integer satisfies these conditions, and hence the answer is 21.
Testcase 2: 120 has 12 as a prefix, and is divisible by 5. Hence this is a valid zzz. You can check that no smaller integer satisfies these conditions, and hence the answer is 120.
